block.header: pitopi koso pito mo mati yoki nagaki ke wo kaku nomwi mataba arikatu masizi

kamuyo ywori aretugikureba pito sapani kuni ni pa mitite adimura no kaywopi pa yukedo a ga kwopuru kimi ni si araneba piru pa pi no kururu made yworu pa ywo no akuru kipami omopitutu i mo negatenito akasituraku mo nagaki ko no ywo wo

sentence.transcription: naga ki ko no ywo wo

block.header: yama no pa ni adimura sawaki yuku naredo ware pa sabusi we kimi ni si araneba

sentence.transcription: kimi ni si ara ne ba

block.header: apumidi no tokwonoyama n aru isayagapa ke no korogoro pa kwopwitutu mo aramu
kimi matu to wa ga kwopwi woreba wa ga yadwo no sudare ugwokasi aki no kaze puku
kaze wo dani kwopuru pa tomosi kaze wo dani komu to si mataba nani ka nagekamu

sentence.transcription: ko mu to si mata ba

block.header: manwonoura no yodo no tugipasi kokoro yu mo omope ya imo ga ime ni si miyuru
kapanope no itumo no pana no itu mo itu mo kimase wa ga sekwo tokizikyeme ya mo

sentence.transcription: toki zi kye me ya mo

block.header: koromode ni toritodokopori naku kwo ni mo masareru ware wo okite ikani semu
okite ikaba imo kwopwimu kamo sikitape no kurwokami sikite nagaki ko no ywo wo

sentence.transcription: naga ki ko no ywo wo

block.header: wagimokwo wo apisirasimesi pito wo koso kwopwi no masareba uramyesimi omope
asapikage nipopyeru yama ni teru tukwi no akazaru kimi wo yamagwosi ni okite
mikumanwo no ura no pamayupu momopye nasu kokoro pa mopedo tadani apanu kamo
inisipye ni arikyemu pito mo a ga goto ka imo ni kwopwitutu inekatezukyemu

sentence.transcription: i ne kate zu kye mu

block.header: ima nomwi no waza ni pa arazu inisipye no pito so masarite ne ni sape nakisi
momopye ni mo kisikanu kamo to omope kamo kimi ga tukapi no miredo akazaramu
kamukazeno ise no pamawogwi woripusete tabine ya su ramu araki pamapye ni
wotomyera ga swode puru yama no midukaki no pisasiki toki yu omopiki ware pa
natunwo yuku wosika no tunwo no tuka no ma mo imo ga kokoro wo wasurete omope ya
tamakinu no sawisawi sidumi ipye no imo ni mono ipazu kite omopikanetu mo
kimi ga ipye ni wa ga sumisaka no ipyedi wo mo ware pa wasurezi inoti sinazupa
imasarani nani wo ka omopamu utinabiki kokoro pa kimi ni yorinisi monowo
wa ga sekwo pa mono na omoposi koto si araba pwi ni mo midu ni mo ware nakyenaku ni

sentence.transcription: pwi ni mo midu ni mo

block.header: sikitape no makura yu kukuru namita ni so ukine wo sikyeru kwopwi no sigeki ni
koromode no waku koyopi ywori imo mo ware mo itaku kwopwimu na apu yosi wo nami

tawayamye no kusige ni noreru kagami nasu mitu no pamapye ni saniturapu pimo tokisakezu wagimokwo ni kwopwitutu woreba akegure no asa kwirigakuri naku tadu no ne nomwi si nakayu wa ga kwopuru tipye no pitopye mo nagusamoru kokoro mo ari ya to ipye no atari wa ga tati mireba awopata no kadurakwiyama ni tanabikyeru sirakumo gakuru amasagaru pina no kunipye ni tadamukapu apadi wo sugwi apasima wo sogapi ni mitutu asanagi ni kakwo no kowe ywobi yupunagi ni kadi no to situtu nami no pe wo iyukisagukumi ipa no ma wo iyukimotopori inabituma uramwi wo sugwite torizimono nadusapiyukeba ipyenosima no ariswo no upe ni utinabiki sizini opwitaru nanoriso ga nado ka mo imo ni norazu kinikyemu

sentence.transcription: ti pye no pito pye mo
nora zu ki ni kye mu

block.header: sirwotapeno swode tokikapete kapyerikomu tukwipi wo yomite yukite komasi wo
wa ga sekwo pa iduku yuku ramu okutumono nabari no yama wo kyepu ka kwoyu ramu
aki no ta no poda no karibaka kayoriapaba soko mo ka pito no wa wo kotonasamu
opopara no ko no itusiba no itu si ka to wa ga omopu imo ni koyopi apyeru kamo
wa ga sekwo ga kyeseru koromo no parime otizu irinikye rasi mo wa ga kokoro sape
pitori nete tayenisi pimo wo yuyusimito semu subye sirazu ne nomwi si zo naku
wa ga moteru mitu api ni yoreru ito motite tuketemasi mono ima so kuyasiki

sentence.transcription: mi tu api ni yor e ru

block.header: kamukwi ni mo te pa puru to pu wo ututapeni pitoduma to ipeba purenu mono kamo

sentence.transcription: te pa puru to pu wo

block.header: kasuganwo no yamabye no miti wo osori naku kaywopisi kimi ga miyenu koro kamo
amatutumi tune suru kimi pa pisakatano kizo no ywo no ame ni korinikyemu kamo

sentence.transcription: kizo no ywo no ame ni

block.header: pisakatano ame mo puranu ka amatutumi kimi ni tagupite ko no pi kurasamu
nipa ni tatu asade kariposi nunwo sarasu adumawomina wo wasuretamapu na
wotomyera ga tamakusige n aru tamakusi no kamusabwikyemu mo imo ni apazu areba
yoku wataru pito pa tosi ni mo ari to pu wo itu no ma ni so mo wa ga kwopwinikyeru

sentence.transcription: itu no ma ni so mo

block.header: musibusuma nagwoya ga sita ni puseredomo imo to si neneba pada si samusi mo
sapogapa no kwoisi pumiwatari nubatamano kurwoma no kuru ywo pa tosi ni mo aranu ka

sentence.transcription: kurwo ma no kuru ywo pa
tosi ni mo ara nu ka

block.header: tidori naku sapo no kapase no sazarenami yamu toki mo nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa
komu to ipu mo konu toki aru wo kozi to ipu wo komu to pa matazi kozi to ipu monowo
tidori naku saponokapatwo no se wo piromi utipasi watasu na ga ku to omopeba
sapogapa no kwisi no tukasa no siba na kari sone aritutu mo paru si kitaraba tatikakuru gane
akagwoma no kwoyuru umase no musubitesi imo ga kokoro pa utagapi mo nasi
adusayumi tumapiku ywooto no topooto ni mo kimi ga miyuki wo kikaku si yosi mo
utipisasu miya ni yuku kwo wo maganasimi tomureba kurusi yareba subye nasi
nanipagata sipopwi no nagori aku madeni pito no miru kwo wo ware si tomosi mo

topoduma no koko ni araneba tamapokono miti wo tadopomi omopu swora yasukyenaku ni nageku swora kurusiki monowo miswora yuku kumo ni moga mo takatobu tori ni moga mo asu yukite imo ni kotodopi a ga tameni imo mo kotonaku imo ga tame ware mo koto naku ima mo miru goto tagupite moga mo
sikitape no tamakura makazu apida okite tosi so penikyeru apanaku omopeba
ounoumi no sipopwi no kata no katamopi ni omopi ya yukamu miti no nagate wo
koto kiywoku itaku mo na ipi so pitopi dani kimi i si nakupa tapegataki kamo

sentence.transcription: ita ku mo na ipi so
kimi i si na ku pa

block.header: pitogoto wo sigemi kotitami apazariki kokoroaru goto na omopi wa ga sekwo
wa ga sekwo si togemu to ipaba pitogoto pa sigeku ari tomo idete apamasi wo
wa ga sekwo ni mata pa apazi ka to omopeba ka kyesa no wakare no subye nakarituru
ko no yo ni pa pitogoto sigesi komu yo ni mo apamu wa ga sekwo ima narazu tomo
tune yamazu kaywopisi kimi ga tukapi kozu ima pa apazi to tayutapinu rasi

opokimi no miyuki no manima mononopuno yaswotomonowo to ideyukisi utukusi tuma pa amatobuya karu no miti ywori tamatasuki unebwi wo mitutu asamoyosi kwidi ni iritati matutiyama kwoyu ramu kimi pa momitiba no tiritobu mitutu mutumasimi ware pa omopazu kusamakura tabi wo yorosi to omopitutu kimi pa aramu to aswoswoni pa katu pa siredomo sikasugani moda earaneba wa ga sekwo ga yuki no manima ni opamu to pa tipye ni omopedo tawayamye no wa ga mwi ni si areba mitimori no twopamu kotape wo ipiyaramu subye wo siranito tatite tumaduku

sentence.transcription: wa ga mwi ni si areba

block.header: okure wite kwopwitutu arazupa kwinokuni no imosenoyama ni aramasi monowo
wa ga sekwo ga atwo pumimotome opiyukaba kwi no sekimori i todometemu kamo

mikanopara tabi no yadori ni tamapokono miti no yukiapi ni amakumo no yoso nomwi mitutu kototopamu yosi no nakyereba kokoro nomwi musetutu aru ni ametuti no kamwi kotoyosete sikitape no koromode kapete onoduma to tanomyeru koyopi aki no ywo no momoywo no nagasa arikosenu kamo
amakumo no yoso ni misi ywori wagimokwo ni kokoro mo mwi sape yorinisi monowo
koyopi no payaku akenaba subye wo nami aki no momoywo wo negapituru kamo
ametuti no kamwi mo tasukeyo kusamakura tabi yuku kimi ga ipye ni itaru made
opobuneno omopitanomisi kimi ga inaba ware pa kwopwimu na tadani apu madeni
yamatodi no sima no uramwi ni yosuru nami apida mo nakyemu wa ga kwopwimaku pa
wa ga kimi pa wake woba sine to omope ka mo apu ywo apanu ywo putatu yuku ramu
amakumo no sokipye no kipami topokyedomo kokoro si yukeba kwopuru mono kamo
purupito no tamapesimetaru kibwi no sake yamaba subye nasi nukisu tabaramu
kimi ga tame kamisi matizake yasunonwo ni pitori ya nomamu tomo nasi nisite
tukusibune imada mo koneba arakazime araburu kimi wo miru ga kanasisa
opobune wo kogi no susumi ni ipa ni pure kapyeraba kapyere imo ni yorite pa
tipayaburu kamwi no yasiro ni wa ga kakesi nusa pa tabaramu imo ni apanaku ni

sentence.transcription: imo ni apa na ku ni

block.header: koto mo naku ikikosi monowo oinami ni kakaru kwopwi ni mo ware pa apyeru kamo

sentence.transcription: ware pa ap ye ru kamo

block.header: kwopwisinamu toki pa nani semu ikyeru pi no tame koso imo wo mimaku pori sure
omopanu wo omopu to ipaba oponwo n aru mikasa no mori no kamwi si sirasamu
itwoma naku pito no maywone wo itadurani kakasimetutu mo apanu imo kamo
kurwokami ni sirwokami maziri oyuru made kakaru kwopwi ni pa imada apanaku ni
yamasuge no mwi naranu koto wo wa ni yosori iparesi kimi pa tare to ka nu ramu
opotomonomitu to pa ipazi akanesasi tereru tukuywo ni tadani apyeri tomo
kusamakura tabi yuku kimi wo utukusimi tagupite so kosi sika no pamapye wo
supa ni aru ipakuniyama wo kwoyemu pi pa tamuke yoku seyo arasi so no miti

sentence.transcription: ta muke yo ku se yo

block.header: misakimwi no ariswo ni yosuru ipopyenami tatite mo wite mo wa ga mopyeru kimi

sentence.transcription: wa ga mop ye ru kimi

block.header: karapito no koromo simu to pu murasaki no kokoro ni simite omopoyuru kamo
yamatopye ni kimi ga tatu pi no tikadukeba nwo ni tatu sika mo toyomite so naku
tukuywo yosi kapa no oto sayakesi iza koko ni yuku mo yukanu mo aswobite yukamu
maswokagami miakanu kimi ni okurete ya asita yupupye ni sabwitutu woramu
nubatamano kurwokami kapari sirakete mo itaki kwopwi ni pa apu toki arikyeri
koko ni arite tukusi ya iduku sirakumo no tanabiku yama no kata ni si aru rasi
kusakaye no iriye ni asaru asitadu no ana tadutadusi tomo nasi nisite
ima ywori pa kwinoyama miti pa sabusikyemu wa ga kaywopamu to omopisi monowo
wa ga koromo pito ni na kise so abiki suru nanipawotokwo no te ni pa puru tomo
ametuti to tomoni pisasiku sumapamu to omopite arisi ipye no nipa pa mo
mimaturite imada toki dani kaparaneba tositukwi no goto omopoyuru kimi
asipikino yama ni opwitaru suganoneno nemokoro mimaku posiki kimi kamo
ikite araba mimaku mo sirazu nani si ka mo sinamu yo imo to ime ni miyeturu
masurawo mo kaku kwopwikyeru wo tawayamye no kwopuru kokoro ni tagupi arame ya mo
tukwikusano uturopiyasuku omope ka mo wa ga omopu pito no koto mo tugekonu
kasugayama asa tatu kumo no winu pi naku mimaku no posiki kimi ni mo aru kamo
idete inamu toki si pa aramu wo kotosarani tumagwopwi situtu tatite inu besi ya

sentence.transcription: toki si pa ara mu wo

block.header: apimizupa kwopwizaramasi wo imo wo mite motona kaku nomwi kwopwiba ikani semu

sentence.transcription: kwopwi ba ika ni se mu

block.header: wa ga katami mitutu sinwopase aratamano tosinowo nagaku ware mo sinwopamu
siratorino tobayamamatu no matitutu so wa ga kwopwiwataru ko no tukwigoro wo
koromode wo utimwi no satwo ni aru ware wo sirani so pito pa matedo kozukyeru
aratamano tosi no penureba ima si pa to yume yo wa ga sekwo wa ga na norasu na

sentence.transcription: wa ga na nora su na

block.header: wa ga omopi wo pito ni sirure ya tamakusige pirakiaketu to ime ni si miyuru
yamwi no ywo ni naku naru tadu no yoso nomwi ni kikitutu ka aramu apu to pa nasi ni

sentence.transcription: apu to pa na si ni

block.header: kimi ni kwopwi ita mo subye nami narayama no kwomatu ga sita ni tati nageku kamo
wa ga yadwo no yupukagekusa no siratuyu no kenu gani motona omopoyuru kamo
wa ga inoti no matakyemu kagiri wasureme ya iya pinikyeni pa omopimasu tomo
yapoka yuku pama no managwo mo wa ga kwopwi ni ani masarazi ka oki tu simamori
utusemi no pitome wo sigemi ipapasino matikaki kimi ni kwopwiwataru kamo
kwopwi ni mo so pito pa sini suru minasegapa sita yu ware yasu tukwi ni pinikyeni
asagwiri no oboni apimisi pito yuweni inoti sinu beku kwopwiwataru kamo
isenoumi no iswo mo todoroni yosuru nami kasikwoki pito ni kwopwiwataru kamo
kokoro yu mo wa pa mopazariki yamakapa mo pyedataranaku ni kaku kwopwimu to pa
yupu sareba monomopi masaru misi pito no kototopu sugata omokage nisite
omopu ni si sini suru mono ni aramaseba titabi so ware pa sinikapyeramasi
turugitati mwi ni toriswopu to ime ni mitu nani no sirusi so mo kimi ni apamu tame
ametuti no kamwi si kotowari nakupa koso wa ga omopu kimi ni apazu sini seme
ware mo omopu pito mo na wasure oponawani ura puku kaze no yamu toki mo nakare
mwinapito wo neyo to no kane pa utu naredo kimi wo si omopeba inekatenu kamo

sentence.transcription: ne yo to no kane pa

block.header: apiomopanu pito wo omopu pa opotera no gakwi no siripye ni nukaduku ga goto
kokoro yu mo a pa omopazuki mata sarani wa ga purusatwo ni kapyerikomu to pa
tikaku areba mizu tomo arisi wo iya toponi kimi ga imasaba arikatu masizi

sentence.transcription: mi zu tomo ari si wo

block.header: imasarani imo ni apame ya to omope kamo kokoda wa ga mune obobosikaramu

sentence.transcription: imo ni apa me ya to

block.header: nakanakani moda mo aramasi wo nani su to ka apimisomekyemu togezaramaku ni
monoomopu to pito ni miyezi to namazipwini tune no omopyeri ari so kaneturu
apiomopanu pito wo ya motona sirwotapeno swode pitu madeni ne nomwi si naku mo
wa ga sekwo pa apiomopazu tomo sikitape no kimi ga makura pa ime ni miyekoso
turugitati na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi kimi ni apazute tosi no penureba

sentence.transcription: na no wosi kye ku mo
tosi no pe nu re ba

block.header: asipye ywori mitikuru sipo no iya masini omope ka kimi ga wasurekaneturu
saywonaka ni tomo ywobu tidori monomopu to wabwi woru toki ni nakitutu motona

ositeru nanipa no suge no nemokoroni kimi ga kikosite tosi pukaku nagaku si ipeba maswokagami twogisi kokoro wo yurusitesi so no pi no kipami nami no muta nabiku tamamo no ka ni kaku ni kokoro pa motazu opobuneno tanomyeru toki ni tipayaburu kamwi ya sakekyemu utusemi no pito ka sapu ramu kaywopasisi kimi mo kimasazu tamadusano tukapi mo miyezu narinureba ita mo subye nami nubatamano yworu pa sugarani akarapiku pi mo kururu made nagekedomo sirusi wo nami omopedomo taduki wo sirani tawayamye to ipaku mo siruku tawarapa no ne nomwi nakitutu tamotopori kimi ga tukapi wo mati ya kanetemu
pazime ywori nagaku ipitutu tanomezupa kakaru omopi ni apamasi monoka
apida naku kwopure ni ka aramu kusamakura tabi n aru kimi ga ime ni si miyuru
kusamakura tabi ni pisasiku narinureba na wo koso omope na kwopwi so wagimo
matu no pa ni tukwi pa yuturinu momitiba no sugure ya kimi ga apanu ywo no opoki

sentence.transcription: apa nu ywo no opo ki

block.header: miti ni apite wemasisi karani puruyukino kenaba kenu gani kwopu to pu wagimo
okipye yuki pye ni yuki ima ya imo ga tame wa ga sunadoreru mopusitukapuna
kimi ni yori koto no sigeki wo purusatwo no asukanokapa ni misogi si ni yuku
kimi ni yori koto no sigeki wo tatuta kwoye mitu no pamapye ni misogi si ni yuku
wa ga tamoto makamu to omopamu masurawo pa wotimidu motome siraka opwinitari
siraka opuru koto pa omopazu wotimidu pa ka ni mo kaku ni mo motomete yukamu

sentence.transcription: ka ni mo kaku ni mo

block.header: nani su to ka tukapi no kituru kimi wo koso ka ni mo kaku ni mo matigateni sure

sentence.transcription: ka ni mo kaku ni mo

block.header: patupana no tiru beki monowo pitogoto no sigeki ni yorite yodomu koro kamo
upapye naki mono kamo pito pa sika bakari topoki ipyedi wo kapyesaku omopeba
me ni pa mite te ni pa torayenu tukwi no uti no katura no gotoki imo wo ikani semu

sentence.transcription: te ni pa tora ye nu
imo wo ika ni se mu

block.header: kokodaku ni omopikyeme ka mo sikitapeno makura katasaru ime ni miyekyeru
ipye ni site miredo akanu wo kusamakura tabi ni mo tuma to aru ga tomosisa
kusamakura tabi ni pa tuma pa witaredomo kusige no uti no tama wo koso omope
wa ga koromo katami ni maturu sikitape no makura wo sakezu makite sanemase
wa ga sekwo ga katami no koromo tumadopi ni wa ga mwi pa sakezi kototopazu tomo
tada pitoywo pyedatesi karani aratamano tukwi ka penuru to kokoro pa matwopu
wa ga sekwo ga kaku kwopure koso nubatamano ime ni miyetutu inerayezukyere
pasikyeyasi ma tikaki satwo wo kumowi ni ya kwopwitutu woramu tukwi mo penaku ni

sentence.transcription: tukwi mo pe na ku ni

block.header: tatu to ipaba wabwisimi semu to yakitatino pyetukapu koto pa sakiku ya wa ga kimi

sentence.transcription: saki ku ya wa ga kimi

block.header: wagimokwo ni kwopwite midareba kurubyeki ni kakete yosemu to wa ga kwopwisomesi
yo no naka no womina ni si araba wa ga wataru anase no kapa wo watarikaneme ya
ima pa wa pa wabwi so sinikyeru iki no wo ni omopisi kimi wo yurusaku mopeba
sirwotapeno swode wakaru beki pi wo tikami kokoro ni musepi ne nomwi si nakayu
masurawo no omopiwabwitutu tabimaneku nageku nageki wo opanu mono kamo
kokoro ni pa wasururu pi naku omopedomo pito no koto koso sigeki kimi ni are
apimizute ke nagaku narinu ko no koro pa ikani sakiku ya ipukasi wagimo
natukuzuno tayenu tukapi no yodomyereba koto si mo aru goto omopituru kamo
wagimokwo pa tokoyo no kuni ni sumikye rasi mukasi misi ywori wotimasinikyeri
pisakatano ama no tuyusimo okinikyeri ipye n aru pito mo matikwopwinu ramu
tamamori ni tama pa sadukete katugatu mo makura to ware pa iza putari nemu
kokoro ni pa wasurenu monowo tamasakani minu pi samaneku tukwi so penikyeru

sentence.transcription: mi nu pi sa mane ku

block.header: apimite pa tukwi mo penaku ni kwopu to ipaba wosoro to ware wo omoposamu kamo
omopanu wo omopu to ipaba ametuti no kamwi mo sirasamu opo re sa kapyeru
ware nomwi so kimi ni pa kwopuru wa ga sekwo ga kwopu to pu koto pa koto no nagusa so
omopazi to ipitesi monowo panezuirono uturopiyasuki wa ga kokoro kamo
omopu tomo sirusi mo nasi to siru monowo nani si ka kokoda wa ga kwopwiwataru
arakazime pitogoto sigesi kaku si araba siweya wa ga sekwo oku mo ikani arame

sentence.transcription: oku mo ika ni ara me

block.header: na wo to a wo pito so saku naru ide wa ga kimi pito no nakagoto kikikosu na yume
kwopwikwopwite apyeru toki dani utukusiki koto tukusiteyo nagaku to omopaba
agwo no yama ipopye kakuseru sate no saki sade papesi kwo ga ime ni si miyuru
sapo watari wagapye no upe ni naku tori no kowe natukasiki pasiki tuma no kwo
iswonokami puru tomo ame ni saparame ya imo ni apamu to ipitesi monowo
mukapiwite miredomo akanu wagimokwo ni tatiwakare yukamu taduki sirazu mo
apiminu pa ikupisasa ni mo aranaku ni kokodaku ware pa kwopwitutu mo aru ka
kwopwikwopwite apitaru monowo tukwi si areba ywo pa komoru ramu simasi pa arimate
asa ni ke ni iroduku yama no sirakumo no omopisugu beki kimi ni aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: kimi ni ara na ku ni

block.header: asipikino yamatatibana no iro ni ideyo katarapitugite apu koto mo aramu
tukuyomi no pikari ni kimase asipikino yama kipyenarite topokaranaku ni
tukuyomi no pikari pa kiywoku teraseredo matwopu kokoro ni omopiapenaku ni
situtamaki kazu ni mo aranu inoti moti nani si ka kokodaku wa ga kwopwiwataru
maswokagami twogisi kokoro wo yurusiteba noti ni ipu tomo sirusi arame ya mo
matamatuku wotikoti kanete koto pa ipedo apite noti koso kui ni pa ari to ipe

sentence.transcription: kui ni pa ari to ipe

block.header: wominapyesi sakisapa ni opuru panakatumi katute mo siranu kwopwi mo suru kamo
wata no soko oki wo pukamete wa ga omopyeru kimi ni pa apamu tosi pa penu tomo
kasugayama asa wiru kumo no opoposiku siranu pito ni mo kwopuru mono kamo
tadani apite miteba nomwi koso tamakiparu inoti ni mukapu wa ga kwopwiyamame
ina to ipaba sipwime ya wa ga se suganoneno omopimidarete kwopwitutu mo aramu

sentence.transcription: sipwi me ya wa ga se

block.header: kedasiku mo pito no nakagoto kikose ka mo kokodaku matedo kimi ga kimasanu
nakanakani tatu to si ipaba kaku bakari iki no wo nisite ware kwopwime ya mo
omopu ramu pito ni aranaku ni nemokoroni kokorotukusite kwopuru ware kamo

sentence.transcription: pito ni ara na ku ni

block.header: ipu koto no kasikwoki kuni zo kurenawi no iro ni na ide so omopisinu tomo
ima pa a pa sinamu yo wa ga se ikyeri tomo ware ni yoru besi to ipu to ipanaku ni

sentence.transcription: sina mu yo wa ga se
ware ni yoru be si to
ipu to ipa na ku ni

block.header: pitogoto wo sigemi ka kimi ga putasayano ipye wo pyedatete kwopwitutu woramu
ko no koro pa titose ya yuki mo sugwinuru to ware ya sika mopu mimaku pore kamo
urupasi to wa ga mopu kokoro payakapa no seki ni seku tomo napo ya kuyenamu
awoyama wo yokogiru kumo no itisirwoku ware to wemasite pito ni sirayu na
umi yama mo pyedataranaku ni nani si ka mo mekoto wo dani mo kokoda tomosiki
terasu pi wo yamwi ni minasite naku namita koromo nurasitu posu pito nasi ni
momosikwino opomiyapito pa opokaredo kokoro ni norite omopoyuru imo
upapye naki imo ni mo aru kamo kaku bakari pito no kokoro wo tukusaku omopeba
kaku nomwi si kwopwi ya wataramu akidunwo ni tanabiku kumo no sugu to pa nasi ni

sentence.transcription: sugu to pa na si ni

block.header: kwopwikusa wo tikaraguruma ni nanakuruma tumite kwopuraku wa ga kokorokara
kwopwi pa ima pa arazi to ware pa omopyeru wo iduku no kwopwi so tukami kakareru
ipyebito ni kwopwisugwime ya mo kapadu naku iduminosatwo ni tosi no penureba
wa ga kiki ni kakete na ipi so karikomono midarete omopu kimi ga tadaka so
kasuganwo ni asa wiru kumo no sikusikuni a pa kwopwimasaru tukwi ni pinikyeni

sentence.transcription: tukwi ni pi ni kye ni

block.header: pitose ni pa titabi saparapi yuku midu no noti ni mo apamu ima narazu tomo
kaku site ya napo ya makaramu tikakaranu miti no apida wo nadumimawikite
patupatuni pito wo apimite ikanaramu idure no pi ni ka mata yoso ni mimu
nubatamano so no ywo no tukuywo kyepu madeni ware pa wasurezu manaku si mopeba

sentence.transcription: so no ywo no tuku ywo

block.header: wa ga sekwo wo apimisi so no pi kyepu madeni wa ga koromode pa puru toki mo nasi

sentence.transcription: api mi si so no pi

block.header: takunapano nagaki inoti wo porisiku pa tayezute pito wo mimaku pore koso
panekadura ima suru imo wo ime ni mite kokoro no uti ni kwopwiwataru kamo
panekadura ima suru imo pa nakarisi wo idure no imo so sokoba kwopwitaru
omopiyaru subye no siraneba katamopi no soko ni so ware pa kwopwinarinikyeru
mata mo apamu yosi mo aranu ka sirwotapeno wa ga koromode ni ipapi todomemu
yupuyamwi pa miti tadutadusi tukwi matite yukase wa ga sekwo so no ma ni mo mimu

sentence.transcription: so no ma ni mo mi mu

block.header: miswora yuku tukwi no pikari ni tada pitome apimisi pito no ime ni si miyuru
kamotori no aswobu ko no ike ni konopa otite ukabyeru kokoro wa ga omopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga omopa na ku ni

block.header: umasakewo miwa no papuri ga ipapu sugwi te puresi tumi ka kimi ni apigataki
kakipo nasu pitogoto kikite wa ga sekwo ga kokoro tayutapi apanu ko no koro
kokoro ni pa omopiwataredo yosi wo nami yoso nomwi nisite nageki so wa ga suru
tidori naku saponokapatwo no kiywoki se wo uma utiwatasi itu ka kaywopamu
yworu piru to ipu waki sirazu wa ga kwopuru kokoro pa kedasi ime ni miyeki ya

sentence.transcription: ime ni mi ye ki ya

block.header: ture mo naku aru ramu pito wo katamopi ni ware pa omopeba wabwisiku mo aru ka
omopanu ni imo ga wemapi wo ime ni mite kokoro no uti ni moyetutu so woru
masurawo to omopyeru ware wo kaku bakari miture ni miture katamopi wo semu
murakimono kokoro kudakete kaku bakari wa ga kwopuraku wo sirazu ka aru ramu
asipikino yama ni si woreba miyabwi nami wa ga suru waza wo togametamapu na

sentence.transcription: wa ga su ru waza wo

block.header: kaku bakari kwopwitutu arazupa ipakwi ni mo naramasi monowo monomopazusite

tokoyo ni to wa ga yukanaku ni wokanatwo ni monokanasirani omopyerisi wa ga kwo no twozi wo nubatamano yworu piru to ipazu omopu ni si wa ga mwi pa yasenu nageku ni si swode sape nurenu kaku bakari motona si kwopwiba purusatwo ni ko no tukwigoro mo arikatu masizi

sentence.transcription: wa ga yuka na ku ni
wa ga kwo no twozi wo
wa ga mwi pa yase nu

block.header: asakami no omopimidarete kaku bakari nane ga kwopure so ime ni miyekyeru
nipodori no kaduku ikemidu kokoroaraba kimi ni wa ga kwopuru kokoro simyesane
yoso ni wite kwopwitutu arazupa kimi ga ipye no ike ni sumu to ipu kamo ni aramasi wo
wasuregusa wa ga sitapimo ni tuketaredo sikono sikokusa koto ni si arikyeri
pito mo naki kuni mo aranu ka wagimokwo to tadusapariyukite tagupite woramu
tama naraba te ni mo makamu wo utusemi no yo no pito nareba te ni makigatasi

sentence.transcription: te ni mo maka mu wo

block.header: apamu ywo pa itu mo aramu wo nani su to ka ka no yopi apite koto no sigeki mo
wa ga na pa mo tina no ipona ni tatinu tomo kimi ga na tataba wosimi koso nake

sentence.transcription: ti na no i po na ni

block.header: ima si pa si na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi imo ni yorite pa titabi tatu tomo
utusemi no yo ya mo putayuku nani su to ka imo ni apazute wa ga pitori nemu

sentence.transcription: wa ga pito ri ne mu

block.header: wa ga omopi kakute arazupa tama ni moga makoto mo imo ga te ni makaremu wo

sentence.transcription: te ni maka re mu wo

block.header: kasugayama kasumi tanabiki kokoroguku tereru tukuywo ni pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: tukuywo ni pa kadwo ni idetati yupuke twopi asiura wo so sesi yukamaku wo pori

sentence.transcription: asi ura wo so se si

block.header: ka ni kaku ni pito pa ipu tomo wakasadi no notisenoyama no noti mo apamu kimi
yononaka no kurusiki mono ni arikyeraku kwopwi ni apezute sinu beku omopeba
notiseyama noti mo apamu to omope koso sinu beki monowo kyepu made mo ikyere
koto nomwi wo noti mo apamu to nemokoroni ware wo tanomete apazaramu kamo
ime no api pa kurusikarikyeri odorokite kakisaguredomo te ni mo pureneba
pitopye nomwi imo ga musubamu obi wo sura mipye musubu beku wa ga mwi pa narinu

sentence.transcription: wa ga mwi pa nari nu

block.header: wa ga kwopwi pa tibiki no isi wo nana bakari kubi ni kakemu mo kamwi no manima ni
yupu saraba yadwo akemakete ware matamu ime ni apimi ni komu to pu pito wo

sentence.transcription: ko mu to pu pito wo

block.header: asayopi ni mimu toki sape ya wagimokwo ga mi tomo minu goto napo kwoposikyemu
ikyeru yo ni a pa imada mizu koto tayete kaku omosirwoku nupyeru pukurwo pa
wagimokwo ga katami no koromo sita ni kite tadani apu made pa ware nukame ya mo
kwopwisinamu soko mo onazi so nani semu ni pitome pitogoto kotitami wa ga semu

sentence.transcription: kot ita mi wa ga se mu

block.header: ime ni dani miyeba koso arame kaku bakari miyezu si aru pa kwopwite sine to ka

sentence.transcription: mi ye zu si aru pa

block.header: omopitaye wabwinisi monowo nakanakani nani ka kurusiku apimisomekyemu
apimite pa ikuka mo penu wo kokodaku mo kurupi ni kurupi omopoyuru kamo

sentence.transcription: iku ka mo pe nu wo

block.header: kaku bakari omokage ni nomwi omopoyeba ikani ka mo semu pitome sigekute

sentence.transcription: ika ni ka mo se mu

block.header: apimiteba simasiku kwopwi pa nagwimu ka to omopedo iyoyo kwopwimasarikyeri
ywo no podoro wa ga idete kureba wagimokwo ga omopyerisiku si omokage ni miyu
ywo no podoro idetutu kuraku tabimaneku nareba wa ga mune tatiyaku gotosi
yoso ni wite kwopureba kurusi wagimokwo wo tugite apimimu kotopakari seyo
topoku araba wabwite mo aramu wo satwo tikaku ari to kikitutu minu ga subyenasa

sentence.transcription: wabwi te mo ara mu wo

block.header: sirakumo no tanabiku yama no takatakani wa ga omopu imo wo mimu yosi moga mo
ikanaramu toki ni ka imo wo mugurapu no kitanaki yadwo ni iriimasetemu
utiwatasu taketa no para ni naku tadu no manaku toki nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa

sentence.transcription: ma na ku toki na si

block.header: payakapa no se ni wiru tori no yosi wo nami omopite arisi wa ga kwo pa mo apare

sentence.transcription: wa ga kwo pa mo apare

block.header: kamusabu to inabu ni pa arane pata ya pata kaku site noti ni sabusikyemu kamo
tama no wo wo awawo ni yorite musubyeraba arite noti ni mo apazarame ya mo
momotose ni oisita idete yoyomu tomo ware pa itopazi kwopwi pa masu tomo
pitopye yama pyenareru monowo tukuywo yomi kadwo ni idetati imo ka matu ramu
miti topomi kozi to pa sireru monokarani sika so matu ramu kimi ga me wo pori
miyakwodi wo topomi ka imo ga ko no koro pa ukepite nuredo ime ni miyekonu

sentence.transcription: ime ni mi ye ko nu

block.header: ima sirasu kuninomiyakwo ni imo ni apazu pisasiku narinu yukite paya mina
pisakatano ame no puru pi wo tada pitori yamapye ni woreba ibusekarikyeri
pitome opomi apanaku nomwi so kokoro sape imo wo wasurete wa ga mopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga mopa na ku ni

block.header: itupari mo nitukite so suru utusiku mo makoto wagimokwo ware ni kwopwime ya
ime ni dani miyemu to ware pa podokedomo api si mopaneba ube miyezaramu

sentence.transcription: mi ye mu to ware pa

block.header: kototopanu kwi sura adisawi morotira ga neri no muratwo ni azamukayekyeri
momotitabi kwopu to ipu tomo morotira ga neri no kotoba pa ware pa tanomazi
uduranaku purinisi satwo yu omopedomo nani so mo imo ni apu yosi mo naki
kotodesi pa ta ga koto naru ka woyamada no napasiromidu no nakayodo nisite

sentence.transcription: ta ga koto n aru ka

block.header: wagimokwo ga yadwo no magaki wo mi ni yukaba kedasi kadwo ywori kapyesitemu kamo
ututapeni magaki no sugata mimaku pori yukamu to ipe ya kimi wo mi ni koso
itapuki no kurwokwi no yane pa yama tikasi asu no pi torite motimawirikomu
kurwokwi tori kaya mo karitutu tukapemedo isosiki wake to pomemu to mo arazu

sentence.transcription: pome mu to mo ara zu

block.header: kurwokwi tori kaya mo karitutu tukapemedo isosiki wake to tukapu to mo arazu
nubatamano kizo pa kapyesitu ko yopi sape ware wo kapyesu na miti no nagate wo
kaze takaku pye ni pa pukedomo imo ga tame swode sape nurete kareru tamamo so

sentence.transcription: kar e ru tama mo so

block.header: wototosi no sakitutosi ywori kotosi made kwopuredo na zo mo imo ni apigataki
ututu ni pa mata mo eipazi ime ni dani imo ga tamoto wo maki nu to si miba
wa ga yadwo no kusa no upe sirwoku oku tuyu no mwi mo wosikarazu imo ni apazaraba
paru no ame pa iya sikipuru ni ume no pana imada sakanaku ito wakami kamo
ime no goto omopoyuru kamo pasikiyasi kimi ga tukapi no maneku kaywopeba
ura wakami pana sakikataki ume wo uwete pito no koto sigemi omopi so wa ga suru

sentence.transcription: omopi so wa ga su ru

block.header: kokoroguku omopoyuru kamo parukasumi tanabiku toki ni koto no kaywopeba
parukaze no oto ni s idenaba arisarite ima narazu tomo kimi ga manima ni

sentence.transcription: oto ni s ide na ba

block.header: okuyama no ipakage ni opuru suganoneno nemokoro ware mo apimopazare ya
parusame wo matu to ni si a rasi wa ga yadwo no wakakwi no ume mo imada pupumyeri

sentence.transcription: matu to ni si a ra si
